content: لاَزِم تِستَيقِظ باكِراً حَتّى تَصِل في مُوعِدِكَ
translations: eng:you must wake up early to arrive for your appointment

transcriptions.arabizi: laezim tistay'uz baekiran hatta tasal fi muwAid|ak
